    COALESCE(AVG(fc.cotton_yield), 0) AS avg_cotton_yield,
    COALESCE(AVG(pulse_data.total_pulse_yield), 0) AS avg_pulse_yield
FROM 
    dim_geography d
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        fc.geography_id,
        fc.year_id,
        fc.cotton_yield
    FROM 
        fact_commercial_crops fc
